CustomField.description: Please search for internal documentation 'Configuration of summary fields on Deal' to read detailed instructions on how to configure these fields
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Free text + 'tag numbers' (starting with 0 and surrounded by curly brackets) for each Asset in Deal's summary. Ex: MSN: {0}, Rent: ${1}K, Type: {2}, Age: {3} years
CustomField.label: Assets in Deal Summary Configuration
